target: 1. Weren't You Going to Hit Him?
July 22
I'm sorry... For leaving for Tokyo all on my own...
I'm the one... who should be sorry. For not going to see you off...
Jeez, Sis... Weren't you going to hit him?
Well, whatever.
It's better if Shin-chan and Sis... get along well, anyway...
(Is it really... better that way?)
(I feel happy seeing those two right now. There's no lie or falsehood in that feeling.)
(But... I wonder why? There's also a part of me that can't be genuinely happy about it...)
...From Dad?
Ah, Mio. How are things over there?
Shinpei just suddenly ran off, right. I was worried...
Ah, it's fine. I caught up to him.
He's talking with Sis right now.
Oh! That's good, then.
Sorry for leaving the restaurant. I'll be back soon.
You don't have to hurry. You wanted to talk to Shinpei, right?
It's been a while, so you should take your time and talk to him too, Mio.
I-It's fine. It's not like I slipped out of the restaurant to do that.
Hahaha. Oh, that's right. Shinpei said his parents were out today, right?
Yeah, he said they went to Osaka for work.
Since he's here, we should have Shinpei eat dinner with us at our place.
That's a great idea!
While you're at it, could you tell Shinpei he can just stay over?
Yeah, I'll make sure to tell him! Thanks, Dad!
Staying over at our place, huh. It feels nostalgic, like the old days.
I wonder what Sis and Shin-chan are talking about? They seem way too close...
Hehe, I'm gonna go interrupt them.
Jeez! Hiding and watching us is in bad taste.
And you were acting awfully friendly even though you said you were definitely going to hit him?
I'm telling you! That wasn't it! Right, Shinpei!
Eh...? Ah, yeah...
How should I put it... We both had a weird dream.
Eh...? A dream? Is it even possible for two people to have the exact same dream?
Well, I don't think it's something that normally happens, but...
Even if you tell me that, I have no idea what you're talking about.
We're the ones who don't know what to say to that... right?
Yeah... It's not like we're lying.
*Sigh*...
You're acting kind of weird today, Mio.
Yeah, I won't deny that. I think I'm acting a bit strange myself.
Ah, but I don't have a headache or feel sick or anything, so don't worry.
Is that so? Then that's fine, but.
No, not feeling sick but acting strange is a problem in its own right, isn't it?
I told you not to worry about it! You're being weirdly nitpicky.
More importantly, Shin-chan, Dad said you should just stay over at our place today.
Eh? Is that okay?
If Sis is fine with it, then it's fine, isn't it?
Hah!? Wh-Why is it up to my judgment!
Because before, you said something like you'd never let him step over our threshold again.
Ugh…
Th-Then, I might forgive you if you make dinner for us today, Shinpei!
Yeah, that's an easy request. Is the menu curry?
Obviously! As expected of Shinpei, you get it!
Well, I was planning to make curry for you even if you didn't ask.
Alright! I finally get to have Shinpei's curry for the first time in 2 years!
Then, I'll let Dad know.
Hm? What is it, Shin-chan?
Ah, no, it's nothing.
Curryyyy! Curry curry! Curryyyy!
I get it, I get it. I'll make it right away, so sit quietly.
To make up for making you wait so long, I'll put my all into making it.
I'm counting on it, Shinpei!
Sis is super excited, huh...
Of course I am! I've been made to wait for 2 whole years, you know?
Hahaha... At this rate, it might be better to make extra today.
I'm a growing girl, after all. Make it a large portion!
Then I'll make Ushio's a large portion, no, an extra-large portion. What about you, Mio?

…Mio?
What's wrong?
N-Nothing…
A normal portion is fine... I can't eat as much as Sis can.
Mio, what's wrong? You really are acting weird, you know?
Eh? I-I'm fine.
I'm looking forward to Shin-chan's curry!
Ah, that's right. Shin-chan, if you'd like--
Shinpei, want me to help?
Ah…
It's fine. I told you to sit down, didn't I.
What's with that attitude!? I'm offering to help, but you don't look happy about it at all!
I didn't say that, but can you really help?
Hah!?
Shinpei, are you picking a fight with me? Want me to show you my brilliant knife skills!?
Wait, I get it! I'll teach you properly, so you don't need to hold a knife!
Hmph, as long as you understand.

So?
What should I do?
Let's see... for now, just peel the potatoes or something.
Yeah, leave it to me!
Shinpei, how am I supposed to remove this sprout-looking thing?
There's a part sticking out on the side of the peeler, right? You just use that.
This? I'll give it a try!
Hnnngh...!
Eh, isn't this super hard? I can't do it well at all...!
H-Hey, be careful. It's dangerous if you slip.
I know. Nnnnnngh...!!
Ah, I can't watch this anymore! Hand it over, I'll do it!
It's fine! Shinpei, you just hurry up and do your own thing!
Hey! I'm saying this for your own good, you know!?
It's none of your business!
...Hehe.
(Ah~a, I wanted to help too, but I ended up getting left out of the loop...)
(Well, watching those two is fun. And if I get to eat delicious curry, then I guess it's fine, but...)
Phew~...
Hey, Mio?
Wh-What is it?
Aren't you tired or something? You can go rest in your room, you know.
I-I'm fine! It's really nothing!
You were stressed out because Shinpei wouldn't come back, right?
You should just hit him once! I'll allow it!
...You say that, but you didn't hit him yourself, Sis.
Th-That's not it! I'm going to beat him up after we finish eating the curry!
Why! You apologized this morning!
I'll apologize again later, so that one doesn't count for now!
...Good grief. You really haven't changed at all.
(They really do... get along well.)
...Ah. Sorry, phone call.
A-Ah.
Hello?
Ah, Mio? Sorry for calling so late.
Mio, who's calling?
I told you to be quiet while she's on the phone.
Tokiko? What's wrong?
Ah, Tokiko-chan!
I said be quiet!
Sorry, but can you come out for a bit right now? There's something I want to talk about.
Something you want to talk about...? Ah... hold on a sec.
Shin-chan, Sis. Tokiko called me out, so is it okay if I step out for a bit?
Toki-chan? What does she want?
I don't know, but... Ah, make sure to save my portion of curry.
Yeah, of course. Be careful not to be out too late.
Yeah, thanks. I'll look forward to the curry when I get back. Play nice while I'm gone.
W-We'll see about that!? Shinpei has a talent for making me mad, after all!
Well, don't worry. We'll manage somehow here.
Yeah, I'll be going then.
(I'm not actually worried about them at all, though...)
